title: Add Rust elided destination builder support
description: Rust lichen-link public TX builder maps empty destinations only to AddrMode::None, while the protocol and Python/C APIs support ELIDED. Add an explicit address-mode path or clearly reject unsupported elided TX with a documented API contract and tests.
close_reason: Added build_frame_with_addr_mode with explicit AddrMode::Elided support, preserved build_frame broadcast behavior, and verified tests/clippy/rustfmt.
